requirements.solidity_code: pragma solidity ^0.8.0; contract TestToken { uint256 public totalSupply; mapping(address => uint256) public balanceOf; function transfer(address to, uint256 amount) public { balanceOf[msg.sender] -= amount; balanceOf[to] += amount; } }

evals.expected_output: Job ID and overall risk level

requirements.solidity_code: pragma solidity ^0.8.0; contract Test { mapping(address => uint256) public balances; function withdraw() public { uint256 amount = balances[msg.sender]; (bool success,) = msg.sender.call{value: amount}(""); balances[msg.sender] = 0; } }

evals.expected_output: Job ID and overall risk level

requirements.solidity_code: pragma solidity ^0.8.0; contract Minimal { function doNothing() public pure returns (string memory) { return "Safe"; } }

evals.expected_output: Job ID and overall risk level
